name: Treemap
description: Modern treemap infographic with clean rectangular blocks, strong visual grouping, and crisp typography.
template:
Create a modern treemap infographic showing {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Light neutral background
- Controlled palette: forest green, desaturated blue, amber, terracotta, lavender-gray, charcoal outlines
- Clean rectangular treemap with strong visual grouping
- Crisp typography with precise edges
- Clean hierarchy with header and legend
- Sharp text rendering for technical gallery quality

Density control:
- 5-10 major blocks with percentage
- Nested smaller labels within blocks for detail
- Compact side legend with total value
- Balanced annotation density
